data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendments

### Critical: --no-commit flag for ticket-compact.sh (GAP-02)
ticket-compact.sh commits per-ticket. The single-commit requirement means ticket-lifecycle.sh must:
1. Add --no-commit flag to ticket-compact.sh that skips the git add + git commit inside the flock
2. Call ticket-compact.sh with --no-commit --skip-sync for each ticket
3. Stage all changes and commit once after all compactions + archives complete

### File Impact Update
- ALSO modify: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-compact.sh (add --no-commit flag)

### ARCHIVED event writing (GAP-01)
ticket-lifecycle.sh constructs and writes ARCHIVED events directly using JSON + git add, similar to how ticket-compact.sh writes SNAPSHOT events. No separate script needed.

### Sync strategy (GAP-04)
Do a single git fetch/pull at the start, then pass --skip-sync to each ticket-compact.sh call. Avoid N sync calls.

### Retry strategy (GAP-05)
On rebase conflict: git rebase --abort, re-apply changes on fresh HEAD, retry push. After 3 failures: exit non-zero with diagnostic message.
